wikipedia-omit:Belle Époque Monte-Carlo.notes: No standalone Wikipedia article exists for "Belle Époque Monte-Carlo" as a tourist attraction. It refers to either the Salle Belle Époque event venue at Hotel Hermitage or the general Belle Époque architectural style prevalent in Monte-Carlo, neither of which has a dedicated Wikipedia article under this name.
